workflows.name: H2O Auto-Post
workflows.action: Gera post com Film Promoter → Design com titanio-media → Posta via instagrapi

workflows.name: H2O Auto-Reels
workflows.action: Pipeline: roteiro → narração → vídeo → post Reels

workflows.name: H2O Clipping Monitor
workflows.action: Scraper busca menções dos filmes H2O em portais de cinema → salva relatório

workflows.name: H2O Weekly Report
workflows.action: Gera relatório semanal: métricas social, receita, clipping → envia WhatsApp

workflows.name: H2O Film Launch
workflows.action: Press release + 10 posts agendados + campanha ads + countdown stories

workflows.name: H2O NFS-e
workflows.action: Manda a Nota emite NFS-e automática pro serviço
